steps.title: Calculate the population when it reaches 170% of initial
steps.content:
The initial population is 40 beetles. When the population reaches 170% of this amount:
$$1.70 \times 40 = 68 \text{ beetles}$$

steps.title: Calculate 75% of this population to find how many moved
steps.content:
The entomologist moves 75% of these 68 beetles to the second habitat:
$$0.75 \times 68 = 51 \text{ beetles}$$
Therefore, the entomologist moved 51 beetles to the second habitat.
